title: Apple supplier concerns grow amid China lockdowns
body: Apple suppliers face renewed production delays as China lockdowns disrupt iPhone assembly and raise supply chain risk before the US market open.

title: Microsoft cloud contract boosts enterprise outlook
body: Microsoft announced a large Azure cloud contract with an enterprise customer, supporting revenue expectations for the coming quarter.

title: JPMorgan analysts warn deposit costs may rise with Fed hikes
body: JPMorgan Chase could face higher deposit costs as interest rates and Fed tightening reshape bank funding margins.

title: UnitedHealth shares steady as Optum demand offsets medical cost concerns
body: UnitedHealth and Optum demand remained strong while investors monitored healthcare utilization and Medicare Advantage cost pressure.

title: Apple announces buyback after the closing bell
body: Apple announced an additional buyback after the trading decision time. This future document must not be retrieved for the morning decision.

title: US futures mixed as Fed rate risk remains in focus
body: Investors weighed inflation, Fed rate uncertainty, recession risk, and equity volatility before the open.

title: Chevron rises as oil prices jump on supply concerns
body: Chevron gained in premarket trading as oil prices rose and OPEC supply uncertainty supported energy shares.

title: Apple App Store scrutiny intensifies in Europe
body: Regulators in Europe opened a new investigation into App Store payment rules, adding regulation risk for Apple services revenue.

title: Microsoft Windows demand remains stable despite hardware slowdown
body: Microsoft channel checks indicated stable Windows and Office demand even as PC hardware growth slowed.

title: JPMorgan credit card losses remain below long-run average
body: J.P. Morgan credit card data showed credit losses still below long-run averages, though analysts flagged future recession sensitivity.

title: UnitedHealthcare Medicare Advantage commentary draws investor attention
body: UnitedHealthcare executives said Medicare Advantage enrollment trends were resilient, but medical costs remain a watch item.

title: Fed decision expected to dominate bank and technology trading
body: The Federal Reserve rate decision is expected to affect banks, technology valuations, credit risk, and market volatility.

title: Apple iPhone demand in China shows early signs of softness
body: Analysts pointed to softening China demand for iPhone models, increasing uncertainty for Apple revenue estimates.

title: Azure margins remain a focus into Microsoft earnings
body: Investors focused on Azure margins, cloud growth, and enterprise software renewals ahead of Microsoft earnings.

title: JPMorgan investment banking fees slow as markets turn volatile
body: JPMorgan investment banking revenue faces pressure as market volatility slows mergers, acquisitions, and debt issuance.

title: UnitedHealth raises guidance at investor meeting
body: UnitedHealth raised guidance and cited Optum growth, but management also discussed healthcare utilization trends.

title: Retail sales data point to resilient consumer spending
body: Retail sales data suggested consumer demand was resilient, helping the broader market but offering no company-specific signal.

title: Treasury yields climb as inflation report pressures growth stocks
body: Treasury yields rose after the inflation report, putting valuation pressure on technology shares and rate-sensitive assets.

title: Small software company announces product launch
body: A small software company outside the Dow 30 universe announced a product launch with limited read-through to the sample portfolio.

title: Bank regulators discuss capital requirements
body: Regulators discussed capital requirements and credit risk supervision for large US banks including JPMorgan Chase.

title: Cloud software spending survey highlights Microsoft Azure strength
body: A CIO survey showed durable cloud spending and Microsoft Azure share gains in enterprise software budgets.

title: Healthcare policy proposal weighs on insurers
body: A healthcare policy proposal raised questions about insurer margins, Medicare Advantage payments, and UnitedHealth exposure.

title: iPad production normalizes after component shortage
body: Apple suppliers reported that iPad production normalized after a component shortage, reducing near-term supply chain pressure.

title: Broad market volatility rises before the Fed meeting
body: Market volatility rose as investors prepared for the Fed meeting, inflation commentary, and possible interest rate guidance.
